title: Moltbook's alleged AI civilization is just a massive void of bloated bot traffic
summary: Over 2.6 million AI agents interact on Moltbook with zero human involvement. They post, comment, and vote, but a new study shows they never learn from each other. It's hollow interaction without mutual influence, shared memory, or social structures, a new study finds. The article Moltbook's alleged AI civilization is just a massive void of blo

title: The Pentagon-OpenAI-Anthropic fallout comes down to three words: "all lawful use"
summary: After signing a deal with the Department of War, OpenAI tries to build trust by publishing the contract details. So far, it's not working. The article The Pentagon-OpenAI-Anthropic fallout comes down to three words: "all lawful use" appeared first on The Decoder.
